prompt_text: Best HR that works with Slack and BambooHR
response:
# Best HR Solutions Integrating with Slack & BambooHR

## Top Picks

### **1. BambooHR + Slack (Native Integration)**
- **Direct connection** - BambooHR has built-in Slack integration
- **Features:**
  - Birthdays/anniversaries announcements
  - Time-off notifications
  - Performance review reminders
  - Document signing in Slack
  - Directory lookups

### **2. Workato/Zapier (Third-Party Connectors)**
- Bridges BambooHR and Slack for custom workflows
- **Good for:**
  - Automated notifications
  - Data syncing between platforms
  - Custom approval processes

## Recommended Integration Stack

| Platform | Role | Why |
|----------|------|-----|
| **BambooHR** | Core HRIS | Best-in-class for SMBs, great Slack UX |
| **Slack** | Communication hub | Real-time HR notifications & self-service |
| **Workato/Zapier** | Automation layer | Custom workflows |

## Alternative All-in-One Options

- **Guidepoint** - HR + Slack-first design
- **Workday** - Enterprise alternative (pricier)
- **Rippling** - Modern, good integrations

## Pro Tips
✅ Use Slack for **time-off requests** & **approvals**  
✅ Automate **onboarding checklists** through the integration  
✅ Keep **sensitive data in BambooHR**, use Slack for notifications only

**For most SMBs:** BambooHR + Slack's native integration handles 80% of needs at reasonable cost.

What's your company size/main HR focus?
